arts.ttl: UK flooding sees League One football match postponed on New Year's Day
arts.sum: The UK is being battered by high winds and heavy rain, with more than 150 flood warnings in place on New Year's Day - and the poor weather has forced Wigan to postpone their match

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Huddersfield Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Huddersfield Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
